codeReview.summary: Implementation correctly reads `?mode=signup` during login page initialization, renders signup UI state immediately, and keeps default sign-in behavior when no mode param is provided.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker skipped parts of the fullstack-worker procedure for this UI feature, indicating the skill procedure and mission workflow are not fully aligned.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md` step 5 requires `npm run lint` and step 6 requires `agent-browser` verification for UI features. Transcript skeleton for `f02ea30f-ad45-49a6-94d1-ab5d29db3bca` shows build runs only and no agent-browser invocation; handoff `tests.coverage` explicitly says browser verification is deferred to mission validation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature execution did not follow documented per-feature lint guidance, suggesting enforcement drift between mission conventions and worker execution.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `/Users/anirudhmanjesh/.factory/missions/fbcce583-7257-4bc1-9707-8c0ee4dcc7ec/AGENTS.md` Build Verification requires both `npm run build` and `npm run lint` after each feature. Handoff `verification.commandsRun` for this feature includes build commands only.

summary: Reviewed feature handoff, transcript skeleton, skill, and commit diff for `fix-login-signup-mode-param`. The implementation satisfies the required behavior for `/login?mode=signup` and `/login` defaults, with no blocking or non-blocking code defects identified.
